archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) customized with HCLTech Branding

branding.name: HCLTech Sports Booking
branding.description: An internal corporate sports facility booking platform for HCLTech employees. Emphasizes clarity, frictionless booking, and the brand's vibrant purple-to-blue gradient.

typography.heading_strategy: High contrast, bold weights for key metrics and page titles. Tracking tight on large text (-0.02em).
typography.body_strategy: Clean, highly legible text for data grids and schedules.

layout.spacing_system: Tailwind standard (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8). Generous padding for form fields and cards to prevent clutter.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento-style grids for the admin dashboard (e.g., metric cards, recent bookings). For the booking UI, use a structured CSS grid for the 7AM-10PM hourly slots (e.g., grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-3).
layout.card_style: Minimalist. 1px solid border (#E5E7EB), no heavy drop shadows unless hovered (shadow-sm to shadow-md transition). Rounded corners (rounded-xl).

buttons.primary: Solid gradient background (from-[#5F1EBE] to-[#0578C3]) with white text, rounded-md, hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity.
buttons.secondary: White background, 1px border (#E5E7EB), text_main color, hover:bg-gray-50.
buttons.danger: Red background or red outline for cancellation actions.

inputs.style: Clean outlines (border-gray-300), focus ring with primary brand color (focus:ring-[#0578C3]), rounded-md.

time_slots.available: White background, thin border, text-gray-700, hover:border-[#0578C3].
time_slots.selected: Gradient background (from-[#5F1EBE] to-[#0578C3]), white text, bold.

navigation.style: Sticky top nav with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80). Includes Logo/Brand name and user profile.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All clickable elements must have a distinct hover state (color shift or slight translate-y).
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for standard interactions.
interactions_and_motion.loading: Subtle skeleton loaders or a spinner adopting the brand gradient.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gradients meets APCA/WCAG standards (use white text on the purple-blue gradient).
accessibility_and_testing.testing: CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='book-slot-7am', data-testid='cancel-booking-btn').

media.usage_instructions: Use sports images as rich headers or cards when a user selects a ground. Use the brand gradient references to sample exact CSS colors or as background textural elements on the login page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts.
Use Lucide-React for icons (calendar, clock, user, settings, trash).
Enforce the 2 slots per day per person logic in the UI layer visually (disable booking if max reached).
Build the Admin Dashboard to allow slot release (Friday 11 AM logic can be manual toggle or scheduled UI representation), view all bookings, and block slots for maintenance.
For the login view, require 'Employee ID' and 'Employee Name'.
Ensure the HCLTech purple-to-blue gradient is prominently used for primary CTA buttons and active states.
